name: Baked Mexican Rice
recipeIngredient: 8 slices chorizo or garlic sausage (use less spicy if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until soft.
2. Stir in rice, salt, pepper, and chili powder. Cook for about 2 minutes to lightly brown the rice.
3. Add mushrooms and sausage. Pour in enough boiling broth to cover the rice by 1 inch.
4. Transfer skillet to a preheated oven set at 350°F (175°C). Bake until liquid is absorbed, about 30-35 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
